children.text: for a material violation of, or failure to comply, with any provision of this chapter (including regulations promulgated under this chapter); or
on the ground that unreasonable or exorbitant charges have been imposed for services rendered.

children.heading: Temporary suspension
children.label: b Temporary suspension
children.text: The Secretary may temporarily suspend a license or approval for an activity under this chapter prior to an opportunity for a hearing for any violation of, or failure to comply with, any provision of this chapter (including regulations promulgated under this chapter).

children.heading: Authority to conduct hearings
children.label: c Authority to conduct hearings
children.text: The agency within the Department that is responsible for administering regulations promulgated under this chapter shall have exclusive authority to conduct any hearing required under this section.

children.heading: Jurisdiction
children.label: 1 Jurisdiction
children.text: A final administrative determination issued subsequent to a hearing may be reviewable only in a district court of the United States.

children.heading: Procedure
children.label: 2 Procedure
children.text: The review shall be conducted in accordance with the standards set forth in .section 706(2) of title 5
